phrases.intent_en: Ask which funicular goes up to the Vomero
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale funicolare sale al Vomero?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh foo-nee-koh-LAH-reh SAH-leh al voh-MEH-roh?
phrases.cultural_note: Three funiculars serve the Vomero hill; the Funicolare Centrale from Via Toledo is the most central.

responses.english: The Central Funicular, from Via Toledo.
responses.phonetic: lah foo-nee-koh-LAH-reh chen-TRAH-leh, dah VEE-ah toh-LEH-doh.
responses.local: La Funicolare Centrale, da Via Toledo.

responses.english: At the top of the Vomero, next to the Certosa.
responses.phonetic: een CHEE-mah al voh-MEH-roh, ak-KAN-toh AL-lah cher-TOH-zah.
responses.local: In cima al Vomero, accanto alla Certosa.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get a panoramic view of Naples
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il punto panoramico migliore sul golfo?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel POON-toh pah-noh-RAH-mee-koh meel-YOH-reh sool GOL-foh?

responses.english: From the ramparts of Castel Sant'Elmo, 360° view.
responses.phonetic: DAL-yee SPAL-tee dee KAS-tel san-TEL-moh, VEES-tah ah treh-chen-toh-ses-SAN-tah GRAH-dee.
responses.local: Dagli spalti di Castel Sant'Elmo, vista a 360°.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Via Scarlatti shopping street is

responses.english: Out of the funicular, straight ahead.
responses.phonetic: oo-SHEE-tah DAL-lah foo-nee-koh-LAH-reh, DREET-toh dah-VAN-tee ah lay.
responses.local: Uscita dalla funicolare, dritto davanti a lei.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Certosa di San Martino museum is worth visiting
phrases.text_local: Scusi, vale la pena visitare la Certosa di San Martino?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, VAH-leh lah PEH-nah vee-zee-TAH-reh lah cher-TOH-zah dee san mar-TEE-noh?

responses.english: Absolutely yes, for the view and the historic nativity.
responses.phonetic: as-soh-loo-tah-MEN-teh see, per lah VEES-tah eh eel preh-ZEH-peh STOH-ree-koh.
responses.local: Assolutamente sì, per la vista e il presepe storico.
